title: Fish Tanks
description: Adds fish tanks for your favorite aquatic friends!
body:
![Logo](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/903034361329360989/1180387801989128212/image.png?ex=66391a8e&is=6637c90e&hm=7db3a89e42864eb6ed7e248fb78982aea502162a86a3127cf8676d1e923fec95&=&quality=lossless) ### If you want to commision a mod, message @u1timatej7 on Discord.
Build fish tanks in all sorts of fun shapes for your fish, or have a small tank just for decoration. Tanks are multi-blocks meaning if you put 2 side by side, they will merge into a two block long tank. Using this feature, you can create fun looking fish tanks for your aquatic buddies. Water not included. They also come in all 17 glass types, so you can make rainbow fish tanks or create cool designs on the side. Also, there is the Tinted Fish Tank, but who would want their fishies to be in eternal darkness? ![Small Fish Tank](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/891173183854608465/938618168107237386/small.png) ![Large Fish Tank](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/891173183854608465/938618167767466034/big.png)
